benefits.description: Lost 64 pounds over one year (200 lbs to 136 lbs). Added Retatrutide to reduce calorie intake further.
Became hungrier in August, added Retatrutide to manage increased appetite and enable further calorie reduction to 1250-1350 cal/day

side_effects.description: Period stopped coming for 60 days, then became spotting only, now stopped completely. Likely due to combination of low calorie intake and weight loss at perimenopause stage.

protocol_notes: Height: 5'7". Goal weight: 132 lbs (60 kg). Currently stalled at 136 lbs for 4 weeks despite maintaining 1250-1350 calorie intake. User is in perimenopause with previously regular periods. Considering switching to maintenance mode due to concern about hormonal disruption.
